metadata.description: Key2 marketplace for the sap-diagrams-pro Claude Code plugin (SAP-compliant draw.io diagram generation).

plugins.name: sap-diagrams-pro
plugins.description: Generate SAP-compliant draw.io architecture diagrams: IR v2 engine (skeleton slot layout + channel-routed edges + geometric gate + visual-rubric loop) with content grounding via the SAP Discovery Center (mcp-sap-docs — a community-operated MCP, not SAP) and the SAP-domain skills.
